title: How do you refresh a board inside a iOS mobile app?

posts.author: alexcamp (Alexandre Campagna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all,

How do you force refresh a board inside of the iOS (ipad) app ??
Sometimes we make changes to a board (from user with a PC), but it takes forever for the iOS user to see the refreshed changes.
Sometimes it takes so long that we have to force close the app and re-open.

Please, can you tell me how to refresh the boards inside iOS app?
Thanks !

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Alex! You can either drag down on the screen when in your board with your finger, or you can toggle between board views. Hopefully this helps but do send us a message at support@monday.com if you’re still experiencing performance issues!
